metadata.analyst: Constable Vikas Mehta, Cyber Cell, Chandigarh Police

content: CCTV footage from the main gate of Mehta Residence was reviewed for the time period 18:00 to 21:00 on 15.03.2024. The system recorded one individual entering the compound at 20:12:03 and exiting at 20:47:18. The individual was wearing a black hoodie, face obscured by a mask, and carried a small sack. No other individuals were recorded entering or exiting the compound during this period. The gate camera has a 180-degree field of view and no blind spots. The suspect’s gait and height (approximately 5’9") match the physical description of Rohan Verma. No vehicle or second person was observed. Footage does not corroborate witness Priya Mehta’s claim of seeing the suspect leaving at 7:30 PM. The suspect was not visible on any other camera in the compound except the main gate.
